name: @aily-project/lib-esp32-preferences
author: ailyProject
description: ESP32 NVS 非易失性存储库，封装 ESP32 Arduino Preferences API，支持命名空间、分区、类型化键值、字节数据、类型查询和剩余条目查询。
description_zh_cn: ESP32 NVS 非易失性存储库，封装 ESP32 Arduino Preferences API，支持命名空间、分区、类型化键值、字节数据、类型查询和剩余条目查询。
description_en: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API, including namespaces, partitions, typed key-value data, byte blobs, type queries, and free-entry checks.
description_zh_hk: ESP32 NVS 非揮發性儲存庫，封裝 ESP32 Arduino Preferences API，支援命名空間、分區、型別化鍵值、字節資料、型別查詢和剩餘條目查詢。
description_ja: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_ko: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_de: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_fr: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_es: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_pt: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_ru: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
description_ar: ESP32 NVS non-volatile storage library aligned with the ESP32 Arduino Preferences API.
